title: Manning National Zoo
summary: An Episode 1 mission that sends Division Agents through Outcast defenses to confront faction leader Emeline Shaw.

claims.text: Ubisoft introduced Manning National Zoo as one of the two narrative missions in Episode 1: D.C. Outskirts — Expeditions.
After her defeat on Roosevelt Island, Outcast leader Emeline Shaw retreats into the zoo and is protected by Outcast blockades and followers.
The mission objective is to hunt and confront Emeline Shaw inside the zoo.

paragraphs.text: Manning National Zoo continues the conflict with the Outcasts after Roosevelt Island. Agents breach the faction's defenses and pursue Emeline Shaw through the site.

verification.notes: The official mission brief supports this narrative overview; encounter and collectible details remain pending.
